actions.expression:
select * from (SELECT bj.sid,bj.wyzd,bj.bjsp,bj.ywry 
FROM bj 
WHERE (bj.bj_id=[客户报价.采购单号])
union 
select cgbj.sid,cgbj.rid wyzd,cgbj.spsq bjsp,cgbj.bjry ywry
from cgbj
where (cgbj.wf_status=2 or cgbj.bjql='通过')
and permission('采购报价')) a
ORDER BY sid DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT cymxsheet.rid,
       cymxsheet.cpbh,
       cymxsheet.hhbz,
       cymxsheet.cpgg,
       cymxsheet.khhh,
       cymxsheet.zwpm,
       cymxsheet.ywpm,
       cymxsheet.zhwbgpm,
       cymxsheet.zzsl,
       cymxsheet.gchh,
       cymxsheet.gcdh,
       cymxsheet.jldw,
       cymxsheet.gcjg,
       cymxsheet.wxjg,
       cymxsheet.hgbm,
       cymxsheet.caiziz,
       cymxsheet.tsl,
       cymxsheet.chxs,
       cymxsheet.bzdw,
       cymxsheet.wxmz,
       cymxsheet.zmz,
       cymxsheet.wxjz,
       cymxsheet.zjz,
       cymxsheet.ztj,
       cymxsheet.zkfy,
       cymxsheet.ywrya,
       cymxsheet.ywry,
       cymxsheet.ywsm,
       cymxsheet.cywyzd,
       cymxsheet.nhrl,
       cymxsheet.nhwx,
       cymxsheet.wypp,
       cymxsheet.krcode,
       cymxsheet.dkds,
       cymxsheet.djpm,
       cymxsheet.djpmy,
       cymxsheet.djpmw,
       cymxsheet.jsfs,
       cymxsheet.ywbz,
       cymxsheet.hbdm,
       cymxsheet.krtm,
       cymxsheet.cghbdm,
       cymxsheet.krcode7,
       cymxsheet.cpfl,
       cymxsheet.yjfl,
       cymxsheet.ejfl,
       cymxsheet.sjfl,
       cymxsheet.flmc,
       cymxsheet.rkdd,
       cymxsheet.czwy,
       cymxsheet.ysez,
       cymxsheet.wxbm1,
       cymxsheet.khmc,
       cymxsheet.mjdj1,
       cymxsheet.mjzj,
       cymxsheet.zycpbh,
       cymxsheet.cply1,
       cymxsheet.dkje,
       cymxsheet.yjbl,
       cymxsheet.yj,
       cymxsheet.ljrk,
       cymxsheet.wysm,
       cymxsheet.kh_id,
       cymxsheet.sfsq
FROM cymx,cymxsheet 
WHERE (cymx.rid=cymxsheet.pid) 
  AND (cymxsheet.sjcy>=[客户报价.出运起始]) 
  AND (cymxsheet.sjcy<=[客户报价.出运结束]) 
  AND (ifnull(cymxsheet.sjcy,"")<>"") 
  AND (cymxsheet.fpsb1="是") 
  AND (cymxsheet.ywry=:_user_username_) 
  AND (ifnull(cymxsheet.sjfl,"")="否" 
  OR (ifnull(cymxsheet.sjfl,"")="")) 
  AND (cymxsheet.chsl>=[客户报价.采购数量]) 
  AND (cymxsheet.gczj>=[客户报价.采购金额]) 
ORDER BY cymxsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应客户资料

SELECT kh.rid 
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.company_name=[客户报价.客户名称]) 
  AND permission('客户资料') 
ORDER BY kh.rid ASC

WHERE (cjcp.cpbh=[客户报价.产品资料.专业货号]) 
  AND permission('专业产品')

actions.name: 销售历史
actions.caption: 销售历史
actions.expression:
SELECT wxhtsheet.sid,
       wxht.order_id,
       wxht.customer,
       wxht.dateis,
       wxht.jgtk,
       wxht.hbdm,
       wxhtsheet.wxdj,
       wxhtsheet.Twxdj,
       wxhtsheet.htsl,
       wxhtsheet.jldw,
       wxhtsheet.zje,
       wxhtsheet.bjhh,
       wxhtsheet.sccj1
FROM wxht,wxhtsheet 
WHERE (wxht.rid=wxhtsheet.pid) 
  AND (wxht.wxsh<>"123") 
  AND (wxhtsheet.cpbh=[客户报价.产品资料.产品编号]) 
  AND (wxhtsheet.bjhh=[客户报价.产品资料.专业货号]) 
  AND permission('外销合同') 
ORDER BY wxhtsheet.sid DESC

actions.name: 采购历史
actions.caption: 采购历史
actions.expression:
SELECT cghtsheet.sid,
       cght.hthm,
       cght.wxht,
       cght.sccj,
       cght.htrq,
       cght.hbdm,
       cghtsheet.bjhh,
       cghtsheet.sccj1,
       cghtsheet.cgjg,
       cghtsheet.cgsl,
       cghtsheet.jldw,
       cghtsheet.zje
FROM cght,cghtsheet 
WHERE (cght.sid=cghtsheet.pid) 
  AND (cght.xjht="新") 
  AND (cght.cgsh<>"123") 
  AND (cghtsheet.cpbh=[客户报价.产品资料.产品编号]) 
  AND (cghtsheet.bjhh=[客户报价.产品资料.专业货号]) 
  AND permission('采购合同') 
ORDER BY cghtsheet.sid DESC

SELECT hgbmbsheet.sid,
       hgbmbsheet.hgbm,
       hgbmbsheet.zzsl,
       hgbmbsheet.hwmc,
       hgbmbsheet.cznr,
       hgbmbsheet.dw,
       hgbmbsheet.tsl
FROM hgbmbsheet 
WHERE (hgbmbsheet.sfpz="是") and hwmc=[客户报价.产品资料.中文报关品名] and ifnull(hwmc,'')<>'' and hwmc<>'无'
ORDER BY hgbmbsheet.sid ASC

view.params:
select bjdh from (
SELECT xxck.bjdh
FROM xxck
WHERE   (xxck.xxly="报价" or xxck.xxly='采购报价')  and (xxck.uid=:_user_rid_) 
union 
select bj_id as bjdh
from cgbj
where (cgbj.wf_status=2 or cgbj.bjql='通过')
and permission('采购报价')
  ) aaa
